200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Every 120000 of the damage done by attacks, summons a drone that hovers over the battlefield and analyzes the current battle. After a while, the drone Implements one of the following scenarios : - If the enemy tanks outnumber the allied ones, the drone attacks the tank with the least health and deals 45000 damage. - If the enemy archers outnumber the allied ones, the drone stuns all enemy archers for 2 sec. - If the enemy mages outnumber the allied ones, the drone silences all enemy mages for 4 sec. In any other case, the drone casts a shield on all allies that reduces damage taken by 17%. While active, the drone attacks up to 3 nearby enemies at once, dealing 5000 damage new card to each.

description 4/6

Every 120000 of the damage done by attacks, summons a drone that hovers over the battlefield and analyzes the current battle. After a while, the drone implements one of the following scenarios : - If the enemy tanks outnumber the allied ones, the drone attacks the tank with the least health and deals 70000 damage. - If the enemy archers outnumber the allied ones, the drone stuns all enemy archers for 3 sec. - If the enemy mages outnumber the allied ones, the drone silences all enemy mages for 4,5 sec. In any other case, the drone casts a shield on all allies that reduces damage taken by 30%. While active, the drone attacks up to 3 nearby enemies at once, dealing 8000 damage per second to each. While the summoned drone is airborne, all damage done to all enemies is enhanced by 25% and all summoned minions side with the Inventor for 4 sec (The Skeleton King, Turrets, and the Drone are unaffected).

description 6/6

Every 120000 of the damage done by attacks, summons a drone that hovers over the battlefield and analyzes the current battle. After a while, the drone implements one of the following scenarios : - If the enemy tanks outnumber the allied ones, the drone attacks the warrior with the least health and deals 180000 damage. - If the enemy archers outnumber the allied ones, the drone stuns all enemy archers for 6 sec. - If the enemy mages outnumber the allied ones, the drone silences all enemy mages for 5 sec. In any other case, the drone casts a shield on all allies that reduces damage taken by 40%. While active, the drone attacks up to 3 nearby enemies at once, dealing 12000 damage per second to each. While the summoned drone is airborne, all damage done to all enemies is enhanced by 33% and all summoned minions side with the Inventor for 4 sec (The Skeleton King, Turrets, and the Drone are unaffected). When the drone’s effect is triggered, the Inventor works himself into a frenzy and maximizes his attack speed over 6 sec. Each shot is a critical hit and each has a 50% chance of firing one more ordinary shot at a random target. Activates once per 11 sec or even more seldom.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The drone’s damage is increased by 75% of the Inventor’s damage.

description 4/6

The drone’s damage is increased by 75% of the Inventor’s damage. Inventor’s damage is increased by 25% for 5 sec for each enemy minion that has sided with the Inventor.

description 6/6

The drone’s damage is increased by 75% of the Inventor’s damage. Inventor’s damage is increased by 25% for 5 sec for each enemy minion that has sided with the Inventor. When Inventor goes into a frenzy, the Inventor’s critical attacks deal 200% more damage.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Each shot of the drone restores 40000 health to Inventor.

description 4/6

Each shot of the drone restores 40000 health to Inventor. While the drone is hovering over the battlefield, all allies take 15% less damage.

description 6/6

Each shot of the drone restores 40000 health to Inventor. While the drone is hovering over the battlefield, all allies take 15% less damage. When Inventor goes into a frenzy, they become immune to magic damage.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

As the drone hovers over the battlefield, the Inventor’s crit increases by 50%.

description 4/6

As the drone hovers over the battlefield, the Inventor’s crit increases by 50%. Once in a while, while the drone is hovering, Inventor launches a missile that stuns a random enemy and reduces the target’s physical and magic armor by 20% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

As the drone hovers over the battlefield, the Inventor’s crit increases by 50%. Once in a while, while the drone is hovering, Inventor launches a missile that stuns a random enemy and reduces the target’s physical and magic armor by 20% for 5 sec. When Inventor goes into a frenzy, all enemies are silenced. They can’t use any positive effect abilities (except the set abilities) for 3 sec.

Materials

Fiery Powder
Lens

Arena battle
Cogwheel

purchase in:

purchase in:
Portal chest for dark souls
